log.context:
Build succeeded. Here's a summary of the fix:

**Root cause:** MessagePane and EmojiPicker maintained separate custom emoji caches. When a user uploaded an emoji.gg emoji via the picker, EmojiPicker refetched its own `createResource`, but MessagePane's local `customEmojis` signal (loaded once on mount) was never updated. When the newly uploaded emoji was then used as a reaction, MessagePane couldn't find its URL and rendered `:name:` text instead.
